collection.name: HANSOME Genesis
collection.description: The Genesis collection of the HANSOME universe. Every alpaca is its own original individual — sharing the HANSOME look and feel, but with a unique wool shape, head silhouette, ear shape, expression, and fluff. They are NOT the mascot wearing different accessories.

mascotPolicy.rule: The canonical alpaca (mascotBase) is the official HANSOME mascot and the face of the brand. It is branding only, is NEVER independently minted, has no tokenId of its own, and is NOT counted toward the 500 Genesis NFTs. It is permanently owned and controlled by the HANSOME project.

founderException.note: Founder NFT #001 (one of the 10 Reserved) uses the iconic mascot appearance as its visual base. It is the ONLY NFT in the entire Genesis collection permitted to use the iconic side-swept wool, the signature mascot expression, and the recognizable mascot silhouette.
founderException.ipNote: Minting or owning Founder #001 does NOT transfer ownership of the mascot, brand identity, trademarks, or intellectual property. The mascot and all HANSOME IP remain permanently owned by the HANSOME project.

generatorMustNever: mint the mascot as its own standalone token
use the iconic mascot appearance for any token other than Founder #001
let any Public, Reserved (other than #001), or Legendary NFT reuse the exact mascot appearance
produce a random base body that replicates the mascot's exact wool shape / silhouette / ear / expression

everyAlpacaInCollectionExceptFounder.mustStillReadAs: clearly the same HANSOME universe (shared palette, proportions, pixel-art rendering, cozy countryside identity)

distribution.notes: CANONICAL Genesis distribution: 470 public + 20 legendary + 10 reserved = 500. Founder NFT #001 is ONE of the 10 Reserved NFTs (not an extra). The mascot is separate: never minted and not counted here.

mascot.notes: The mascot has no tokenId and never occupies any id in the 1..500 range. Branding only.

founder.label: Founder NFT

mascotAppearance.exclusive: Founder #001 is the ONLY NFT in the entire Genesis collection allowed to use the iconic mascot appearance.

founder.ipNote: Founder #001 uses the mascot appearance as its visual base, but minting/owning it does NOT transfer the mascot, brand identity, trademarks, or IP — all of which remain permanently owned by the HANSOME project.
founder.notes: Founder #001 is hand-designed and is ONE of the 10 Reserved NFTs (counted inside the reserved allocation, not in addition to it). Do not create any additional Founder outside the reserved allocation. Do not generate its artwork yet.

legendaryTokenIds.notes: Exactly 20 Legendary NFTs, each individually hand-designed with its own identity. They are NOT random trait combinations. Their token IDs are pinned in legendaryAssignments before any random generation runs.

reservedTokenIds.notes: 10 reserved NFTs held back from the public generation pool — INCLUDING Founder #001 as one of the ten. Their IDs are set aside up front so they can never land in the public 470. 470 public + 20 legendary + 10 reserved = 500.

randomPool.notes: Only these 470 are procedurally generated from the trait system. Legendary (20) and Reserved (10, which includes Founder #001) IDs are removed from the candidate id set before generation. The mascot is not a token and is never in the pool.

categoryLabels.comment: Display names for categories; internal keys / folders kept stable to preserve asset IDs and references.

layerNotes.base: The individual alpaca body for this token (from the 'base' category). Each is an original HANSOME alpaca with its own wool shape / head silhouette / ear / expression — NOT the mascot — EXCEPT Founder #001, which uses the iconic mascot appearance as its base. The mascot is never minted as its own standalone token. Base art is composited pixel-for-pixel, never smoothed or upscaled.
layerNotes.fur: Wool-style overlay drawn on top of the chosen base (tufts / texture / edge puffs). 'Classic' is a no-op.
layerNotes.necklace: Neck Accessories (display name). Sits above clothing so a collar/pendant reads over a scarf or sweater.
layerNotes.effects: Ambient foreground elements (butterfly, bee, falling leaf, sparkles). Drawn last, may extend beyond the alpaca silhouette.

baseAnatomyContract.comment: So that hats/glasses/necklaces/etc. line up on every individual, all base-body variants share a common set of anatomy anchor points (crown, eye, ear, muzzle, mouth, neck, chest) within the tolerances below. Variation happens in wool/silhouette/ear/expression AROUND these anchors, not by moving them arbitrarily. Each base may also declare per-base anchor overrides.

anatomy.comment: Pixel coordinates on the 1024x1024 canvas. Originally derived from the mascot; used as the SHARED anchor contract that every base variant aligns to so traits fit naturally.

uniqueness.notes: No two public NFTs may share an identical trait combination. Legendary and Reserved NFTs (Reserved includes Founder #001) are hand-authored and outside this check.

outputs.metadata: NOT generated yet — explicitly out of scope until the trait library is approved.

avatarSystem.principle: Treat Genesis as a reusable AVATAR system, not a one-off NFT image generator. Every trait must fit every archetype automatically through the anatomy anchor system. Avoid character-specific assets whenever possible.
avatarSystem.goal: Every Genesis NFT should eventually become a fully playable alpaca inside HANSOME HUB.
avatarSystem.over: maximizing the number of trait combinations
rules: Traits attach via anchors (crown / ear / eye / neck / chest), scaled per-archetype from measured anatomy.
Prefer ONE anchor-fitted asset per trait that serves all archetypes over per-character variants.
Any unavoidable per-archetype manual offset must be documented in that trait's meta file (e.g., hats/_hats-meta.json > offsets).

completed: clothing (2 kept: Cozy Wool Scarf + Festival Ribbon Outfit, archetype-aware parametric fit — 16/16 clean; Farmer Overalls / Farm Vest / Explorer Cape removed as too human/RPG-like)
status.notes: Anchor-driven trait-fitting in progress. Order: hats, neck accessories, glasses, clothing, mouth (done). Clothing uses a parametric per-archetype fitter (adaptive-scarf.mjs + adaptive-clothing.mjs) verified for clipping/floating/silhouette/face/legs. Mouth uses a DEDICATED per-archetype mouth anchor (hand-verified bite position, independent of eyes; MOUTH_ANCHORS in detect-base-anchors.mjs) with explicit rotation control (default 0 deg = horizontal bite); 5 cozy nature sprigs verified 40/40 clean (0 floating, 0 eye-cover, 0 OOB). Ear accessories and effects follow next. Full library, metadata, Legendary, Founder #001 artwork, and the 500-piece generation remain on hold pending approval.
